prerequisites.value: Int 13, Wis 13, Combat Expertise, Perfect Style, Stunning Fist, Unblinking Flame Feint, base attack bonus +13 or monk level 13th.

description.value: **Benefit:** When using Perfect Style, the save DC of your stunning fist attack increases by 2 against flat-footed targets. When you spend 1 ki point to gain the benefits of Improved Feint for 1 round, you may attempt a feint as part of your movement when charging. Combat Trick Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: You can spend 2 stamina points instead of 1 ki point when using Unblinking Flame Fist.
